story.title: Our Story
story.content: ClimaSite was founded with a simple mission: to provide high-quality HVAC solutions that make homes and businesses more comfortable. Over the years, we've grown from a small local shop to a leading online retailer, serving thousands of satisfied customers.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: To deliver exceptional climate control products and services that enhance comfort, improve energy efficiency, and exceed customer expectations.

values.expertiseDesc: Our team of HVAC specialists is ready to guide you to the perfect solution.
values.sustainabilityDesc: We promote energy-efficient solutions that are better for your wallet and the planet.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common HVAC questions

sizing.question: How do I know what size HVAC system I need?
sizing.answer: The size of your HVAC system depends on several factors including your home's square footage, insulation quality, number of windows, and local climate. A professional can perform a Manual J load calculation to determine the exact size needed. Generally, you need about 20 BTUs per square foot, but this can vary significantly based on your specific situation.

maintenance.question: How often should I service my HVAC system?
maintenance.answer: We recommend having your HVAC system professionally serviced at least twice a year - once in spring before cooling season and once in fall before heating season. Additionally, you should replace or clean your air filters every 1-3 months depending on usage and filter type.

efficiency.question: What SEER rating should I look for?
efficiency.answer: SEER (Seasonal Energy Efficiency Ratio) measures cooling efficiency. The minimum SEER for new systems is 14, but we recommend SEER 16 or higher for optimal efficiency and energy savings. Higher SEER units cost more upfront but provide significant long-term savings on energy bills.

warranty.question: What warranty do your products come with?
warranty.answer: Most of our HVAC equipment comes with manufacturer warranties ranging from 5 to 10 years on parts. Extended warranties are available for purchase. Professional installation is required to maintain warranty coverage on most products.

installation.question: Do you offer professional installation services?
installation.answer: Yes, we partner with certified HVAC technicians across the country to provide professional installation services. Professional installation ensures your system operates at peak efficiency and maintains warranty coverage. Contact us for a free installation quote.

cta.title: Need More Help?
cta.description: Our team of HVAC experts is here to answer your questions and help you find the perfect solution.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.intro: Answers to the questions our customers ask most often. Can’t find what you need? Reach out to our support team.

0.question: Which payment methods do you accept?
0.answer: We accept all major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), PayPal, Apple Pay and Google Pay. All payments are processed securely; we never store your full card details.

1.question: In which currency am I charged?
1.answer: Orders are charged in euro (EUR). For your convenience, prices are also shown in Bulgarian lev (BGN) using the fixed peg of 1.95583 BGN to 1 EUR. The amount actually debited is the euro total.

2.question: How long does delivery take?
2.answer: Standard delivery within Bulgaria takes 2–4 business days. Orders placed before 2:00 PM on a business day are usually dispatched the same day. You will receive tracking details by email once your order ships.

3.question: Do you offer installation?
3.answer: Yes. Professional installation by certified technicians is available for air conditioning and heating systems across most of Bulgaria. You can add installation during checkout or arrange it later with our support team.

4.question: Can I return a product?
4.answer: You may return most unused items in their original packaging within 14 days of delivery for a full refund, in line with your statutory right of withdrawal. Installed or custom-configured equipment may be subject to conditions — see our Returns & Refunds page.

5.question: Is my purchase covered by warranty?
5.answer: All products come with the manufacturer’s warranty, typically 2 to 5 years depending on the brand and model. Warranty details are listed on each product page and included with your documentation.

6.question: How do I track my order?
6.answer: Once your order ships, we email you a tracking link. You can also view the status of every order at any time from the Orders section of your account.

7.question: How can I contact customer support?
7.answer: Our team is available by phone at 0898 56 75 04 and by email at info@cdl.bg during business hours (Mon–Fri, 9:00–18:00). You can also use the contact form and we’ll reply within one business day.

common.placeholderNote: Placeholder content — pre-launch. This document will be reviewed by legal counsel before the store goes live.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service govern your access to and use of the ClimaSite online store and the purchase of products through it. By using the site you agree to these terms.

0.heading: 1. Acceptance of Terms
0.body: By accessing or placing an order through this website, you confirm that you accept these Terms of Service and that you agree to comply with them. If you do not agree, you must not use the site.

1.heading: 2. Eligibility
1.body: You must be at least 18 years old and able to enter into a legally binding contract to place an order. By ordering, you confirm that the information you provide is accurate and complete.

2.heading: 3. Products and Pricing
2.body: We make every effort to display products and prices accurately. Prices are shown in euro (EUR) with an indicative lev (BGN) value and include applicable VAT unless stated otherwise. We reserve the right to correct errors and to change prices before an order is accepted.

3.heading: 4. Orders and Acceptance
3.body: Your order is an offer to buy. A contract is formed only when we send an order confirmation. We may decline an order — for example if a product is unavailable or a pricing error is detected — and will refund any payment already taken.

4.heading: 5. Payment
4.body: Payment is taken in euro at checkout through our payment provider. You warrant that you are authorised to use the payment method supplied. We do not store full card details.

5.heading: 6. Delivery and Risk
5.body: Delivery times are estimates. Risk of loss passes to you on delivery; ownership passes once we have received payment in full. Delivery terms are detailed on our Shipping Information page.

6.heading: 7. Limitation of Liability
6.body: To the extent permitted by law, we are not liable for indirect or consequential loss. Nothing in these terms excludes liability that cannot lawfully be excluded, including for death or personal injury caused by negligence.

7.heading: 8. Governing Law
7.body: These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Bulgaria. Disputes are subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the competent Bulgarian courts, without prejudice to mandatory consumer-protection rights.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how ClimaSite collects, uses and protects your personal data when you use our store, in accordance with the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

0.heading: 1. Data Controller
0.body: ClimaSite (CDL) is the controller responsible for your personal data. You can reach us at info@cdl.bg for any privacy-related request, including access, correction or deletion of your data.

1.heading: 2. Data We Collect
1.body: We collect the data you provide — such as name, contact details, delivery address and order history — as well as technical data such as IP address and device information collected automatically when you browse the site.

2.heading: 3. How We Use Your Data
2.body: We process your data to fulfil orders, provide customer support, manage your account, comply with legal obligations and — where you have consented — to send marketing communications and analyse site usage.

3.heading: 4. Legal Basis
3.body: We rely on the performance of a contract for order processing, our legitimate interests for site security and improvement, your consent for marketing and analytics cookies, and legal obligation for tax and accounting records.

4.heading: 5. Sharing and Transfers
4.body: We share data only with service providers who help us operate — such as payment processors and delivery partners — under appropriate safeguards. We do not sell your personal data.

5.heading: 6. Data Retention
5.body: We keep your data only as long as necessary for the purposes described or as required by law, after which it is securely deleted or anonymised.

6.heading: 7. Your Rights
6.body: Under the GDPR you have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict and port your data, and to object to certain processing. You may also lodge a complaint with the Bulgarian Commission for Personal Data Protection.

7.heading: 8. Contact
7.body: To exercise any of your rights or ask a question about this policy, contact us at info@cdl.bg or by phone at 0898 56 75 04.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This Cookie Policy explains what cookies are, how ClimaSite uses them, and the choices available to you. It should be read alongside our Privacy Policy.

0.heading: 1. What Are Cookies?
0.body: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help the site remember your actions and preferences and allow certain features to work.

1.heading: 2. Essential Cookies
1.body: These cookies are necessary for the site to function — for example to keep items in your cart, maintain your session and remember your language and theme. They cannot be switched off.

2.heading: 3. Analytics Cookies
2.body: With your consent, we use analytics cookies to understand how visitors use the site so we can improve it. These collect aggregated, non-identifying information.

3.heading: 4. Marketing Cookies
3.body: With your consent, marketing cookies may be used to show you more relevant offers. You can decline these without affecting your ability to shop.

4.heading: 5. Managing Your Choices
4.body: When you first visit, our cookie banner lets you accept or reject non-essential cookies. Until you decide, only essential cookies are used. You can also manage cookies through your browser settings.

5.heading: 6. Updates to This Policy
5.body: We may update this policy as our use of cookies evolves. Material changes will be reflected here with a revised “last updated” date.

returns.title: Returns & Refunds
returns.intro: We want you to be satisfied with your purchase. This page explains how to return an item and how refunds are handled.

0.heading: 1. Right of Withdrawal
0.body: As a consumer you have the right to withdraw from your purchase within 14 days of receiving the goods, without giving a reason, in line with EU consumer law.

1.heading: 2. Condition of Returned Items
1.body: Returned items must be unused, undamaged and in their original packaging with all accessories and documentation. We may reduce a refund to reflect any diminished value caused by handling beyond what is necessary.

2.heading: 3. How to Start a Return
2.body: To begin a return, contact us at info@cdl.bg or through your account with your order number. We will provide return instructions and, where applicable, a return label.

3.heading: 4. Installed and Custom Equipment
3.body: Equipment that has been installed, commissioned or custom-configured may not be eligible for return except in the case of a defect. Please contact us before installation if you have any doubts.

4.heading: 5. Refunds
4.body: Once we receive and inspect your return, we refund the amount due in euro (EUR) to your original payment method within 14 days. Original delivery charges are refunded in accordance with the law.

5.heading: 6. Faulty or Damaged Goods
5.body: If an item arrives faulty or damaged, contact us promptly. You are entitled to a repair, replacement or refund under the statutory warranty for goods.

shipping.title: Shipping Information
shipping.intro: Everything you need to know about how and when your ClimaSite order will be delivered.

0.heading: 1. Delivery Coverage
0.body: We deliver across Bulgaria. For deliveries to other locations, please contact us before ordering so we can confirm availability and cost.

1.heading: 2. Delivery Times
1.body: Standard delivery takes 2–4 business days. Orders placed before 2:00 PM on a business day are usually dispatched the same day; larger items may require additional handling time.

2.heading: 3. Shipping Costs
2.body: Shipping costs are calculated at checkout based on the size and weight of your order and the delivery address. Any free-shipping thresholds will be shown in your cart.

3.heading: 4. Tracking Your Order
3.body: Once your order ships, we email you a tracking link. You can also follow your order status from the Orders section of your account.

4.heading: 5. Large and Heavy Items
4.body: Air conditioning and heating units are delivered by a specialist carrier. We will contact you to arrange a convenient delivery window for bulky items.

5.heading: 6. Delivery Issues
5.body: If your order is delayed, missing or arrives damaged, contact us at info@cdl.bg or 0898 56 75 04 and we will resolve it as quickly as possible.

impressum.title: Impressum
impressum.intro: Legal disclosure and provider identification in accordance with applicable information-duty requirements.

0.heading: Information pursuant to disclosure requirements
0.body: ClimaSite is operated by CDL, a company registered in the Republic of Bulgaria. This Impressum provides the legally required provider identification.

1.heading: Postal address
1.body:
CDL
Sofia, Bulgaria
(Full registered address to be confirmed before launch.)

3.heading: Register and VAT
3.body: Commercial register entry and VAT identification number to be confirmed and published here before the store goes live.

4.heading: Responsible for content
4.body: Responsibility for the content of this website lies with the management of CDL, reachable at the contact details above.

5.heading: Online dispute resolution
5.body: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR) at https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr. We are neither obliged nor willing to participate in dispute-resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.
